records.m_Talk_ENG: No way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Me? Using the chief? And that's what the Vice President said?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Me? Using the chief? And that's what the Vice President said?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Me? Using the chief? And that's what the Vice President said?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this part of the employment test...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this part of the employment test...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this part of the employment test...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My guess is that the Vice President also misunderstood the situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My guess is that the Vice President also misunderstood the situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My guess is that the Vice President also misunderstood the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On paper, you do have a colorful criminal record! Ha ha ha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: On paper, you do have a colorful criminal record! Ha ha ha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: On paper, you do have a colorful criminal record! Ha ha ha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It sucks to be wrongfully accused. Who knew things would end up like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It sucks to be wrongfully accused. Who knew things would end up like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It sucks to be wrongfully accused. Who knew things would end up like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I don't know what to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I don't know what to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I don't know what to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yo ho ho!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yo ho ho!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yo ho ho!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Yuppie. The Sigma Pirates only had one goal from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Yuppie. The Sigma Pirates only had one goal from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Yuppie. The Sigma Pirates only had one goal from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Misunderstandings can be resolved later, but the treasure out there is only one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Misunderstandings can be resolved later, but the treasure out there is only one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Misunderstandings can be resolved later, but the treasure out there is only one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If push comes to shove, we can pay bail with the money we get after selling the treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If push comes to shove, we can pay bail with the money we get after selling the treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If push comes to shove, we can pay bail with the money we get after selling the treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great. Turn the wheel, Yuppie. Credere! Our next destination has been set!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great. Turn the wheel, Yuppie. Credere! Our next destination has been set!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great. Turn the wheel, Yuppie. Credere! Our next destination has been set!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The best vacation spot in the world. Blue Rose Island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The best vacation spot in the world. Blue Rose Island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The best vacation spot in the world. Blue Rose Island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's where the treasure lies!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's where the treasure lies!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's where the treasure lies!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides it being another island, do we have to smuggle ourselves in there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides it being another island, do we have to smuggle ourselves in there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides it being another island, do we have to smuggle ourselves in there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since Credere and I are criminals, we don't have a way to get to the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since Credere and I are criminals, we don't have a way to get to the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since Credere and I are criminals, we don't have a way to get to the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. I have some friends who can help out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. I have some friends who can help out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. I have some friends who can help out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Friends"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Friends"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Friends"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. I'm going to borrow your megaphone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. I'm going to borrow your megaphone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. I'm going to borrow your megaphone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! I will offer my assistance as well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! I will offer my assistance as well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! I will offer my assistance as well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sound output module should be able to help carry your voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sound output module should be able to help carry your voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sound output module should be able to help carry your voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Thank you, Grandpa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Thank you, Grandpa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Thank you, Grandpa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief? Why are you mouthing something without any sound?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief? Why are you mouthing something without any sound?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief? Why are you mouthing something without any sound?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may not be able to hear it, but that does not mean she's not making any noise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You may not be able to hear it, but that does not mean she's not making any noise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You may not be able to hear it, but that does not mean she's not making any noise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look toward the horizon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look toward the horizon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look toward the horizon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are those... dolphins?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are those... dolphins?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are those... dolphins?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. Once you understand the basic principles of echolocation and ultrasound, you can chat with dolphins through their language patterns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. Once you understand the basic principles of echolocation and ultrasound, you can chat with dolphins through their language patterns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. Once you understand the basic principles of echolocation and ultrasound, you can chat with dolphins through their language patterns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All sea creatures are friends of the Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All sea creatures are friends of the Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All sea creatures are friends of the Sigma Pirates!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how this is pirate-y, but this should get us to the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how this is pirate-y, but this should get us to the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how this is pirate-y, but this should get us to the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... what are you doing, Credere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... what are you doing, Credere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... what are you doing, Credere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere got a plank to use as a paddle. Considering the speed of dolphins, it would take a decade to get to the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere got a plank to use as a paddle. Considering the speed of dolphins, it would take a decade to get to the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere got a plank to use as a paddle. Considering the speed of dolphins, it would take a decade to get to the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could be used as a floatie in emergencies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It could be used as a floatie in emergencies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It could be used as a floatie in emergencies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not wrong, but weirdly, it angers me when you are actually helpful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not wrong, but weirdly, it angers me when you are actually helpful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not wrong, but weirdly, it angers me when you are actually helpful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, that should be it for preparations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, that should be it for preparations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, that should be it for preparations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good niiight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good niiight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good niiight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-watch out! You're going to fall!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-watch out! You're going to fall!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-watch out! You're going to fall!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Egh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Egh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Egh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you okay, Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you okay, Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you okay, Yuppie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
This is noth
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
This is noth
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
This is noth
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yuppie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You hit me. You hit me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You hit me. You hit me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You hit me. You hit me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you, Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you, Yuppie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you, Yuppie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cheerleader?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cheerleader?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cheerleader?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Credere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Credere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Credere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, leave it to me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, leave it to me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, leave it to me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, we are here together! Even if the raging waves try to push us away, we're only going to continue forward!

records.m_Talk_FRA: However, we are here together! Even if the raging waves try to push us away, we're only going to continue forward!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mmm. I hope you have a safe journey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Great. Let's go, Sigma Pirates!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's... *Gasp* A lot farther than I thought...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're in trouble, Yuppie. Credere, the routine-following child, is slowly falling asleep.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good niiight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good niiight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good niiight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-watch out! You're going to fall!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-watch out! You're going to fall!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-watch out! You're going to fall!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Egh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Egh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Egh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you okay, Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you okay, Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you okay, Yuppie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. It's just a sore muscle, so don't worry too much.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
This is noth
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
This is noth
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
This is noth
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yuppie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's really okay. It'll get better in no time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If either of you are tired, you can get some shut-eye. I'll keep rowing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Credere is half asleep, but Credere will not let Yuppie row all alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Credere also feels like she would appear in the news if she were to fall asleep here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chief? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chief? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chief? What's wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sorry. This wasn't my intention.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it would be fun to search for the treasure together...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But neither of you looks like you're having fun right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Waaah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Waaah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Waaah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You hit me. You hit me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You hit me. You hit me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You hit me. You hit me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on. You're a kid, you can make mistakes. Why are you so down on the dumps?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Children have the privilege of being able to rely on others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Credere and I are both here out of our own will, so you can just go ahead and laugh "yo ho ho" all you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not "yo ho ho," it's "yo ho ho!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the most pirate-y laughter of a fearsome pirate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even Credere, who has perfect pitch, cannot tell the difference.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you, Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you, Yuppie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you, Yuppie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not really. But it's still better than being all sulky like before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you feel bad, you can be our cheerleader.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cheerleader?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cheerleader?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cheerleader?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I know Credere is going to make fun of me if I say something tacky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some cheering for your crew that can't even properly row... or maybe it's closer to a speech.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Credere?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Credere?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Credere?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least do something with that mouth of yours if you've got nothing else to do. Arr.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, leave it to me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, leave it to me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, leave it to me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone. As expected, the journey to the treasure has been tough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There were several obstacles, such as conflict, despair, and frightening enemies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, we are here together! Even if the raging waves try to push us away, we're only going to continue forward!
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, we are here together! Even if the raging waves try to push us away, we're only going to continue forward!
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, we are here together! Even if the raging waves try to push us away, we're only going to continue forward!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are the Sigma Pirates! We aren't scared of big waves or typhoons!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are the Sigma Pirates! We aren't scared of big waves or typhoons!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are the Sigma Pirates! We aren't scared of big waves or typhoons!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, toward treasure...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, toward treasure...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, toward treasure...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's set saaaaaaail!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's set saaaaaaail!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's set saaaaaaail!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yo ho ho!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yo ho ho!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yo ho ho!
